---
title: "Personnel"
---

```{=html}
<style>




.person-card img{
  object-fit:cover;
  display:block;
  border-radius:12px;
}



</style>
```

## Principal Investigator

:::: person-card
<img src="images/people/pi.jpg" class="profile"/>

<div>

### Dr. Cheng Jack Song

Professor

Research interests

-   Kidney organoids
-   Kidney disease
-   Genomics

</div>
::::

## Staff

:::: person-card
<img src="images/Trang.png" width="100"/>

<div>

### Trang

Lab Manager

Responsible for laboratory management, colony, and daily operations.

</div>
::::

:::: person-card
<img src="images/people/alex.jpg" class="profile"/>

<div>

### Alex

Research Technician

Research interests

-   Single-cell RNA-seq
-   Single-cell ATAC-seq
-   Computational biology

</div>
::::

## Students

:::: person-card
<img src="images/people/person2.jpg" class="profile"/>

<div>

### A

Ph.D. Student

Research interests

-   Disease mechanisms

</div>
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------
